trans-unit.source: 🚧 This section of the training platform and the entire content is under ⚠️construction⚠️ and may not be shared or published! 🚧
trans-unit.target: 🚧 This section of the training platform and the entire content is under ⚠️construction⚠️ and may not be shared or published! 🚧

trans-unit.source: (content:references:module9:ors-tools-plugin)=
trans-unit.target: (content:references:module9:ors-tools-plugin)=

trans-unit.source: Plugin: Openrouteservice (ORS) tools
trans-unit.target: Plugin: Openrouteservice (ORS) tools

trans-unit.source: Openrouteservice QGIS Plugin
trans-unit.target: Openrouteservice QGIS Plugin

trans-unit.source: Install the Plugin
trans-unit.target: Install the Plugin

trans-unit.source: Go under tab `Plugins`
trans-unit.target: Go under tab `Plugins`

trans-unit.source: Click on `Manage and install plugins`, a new window will open up
trans-unit.target: Click on `Manage and install plugins`, a new window will open up

trans-unit.source: Search for "ORS Tools" in search line and click `Install plugin` (right bottom)
trans-unit.target: Search for "ORS Tools" in search line and click `Install plugin` (right bottom)

trans-unit.source: Close the window
trans-unit.target: Close the window

trans-unit.source: After a few seconds the plugin should appear under "Web" tab in QGIS as "ORS Tools"
trans-unit.target: After a few seconds the plugin should appear under "Web" tab in QGIS as "ORS Tools"

trans-unit.source: Icon
trans-unit.target: Icon

trans-unit.source: Open the "ORS tools" plugin - click on the ORS Tolls icon in the toolbar [#$sd1_sf7_dp1]
trans-unit.target: Open the "ORS tools" plugin - click on the ORS Tolls icon in the toolbar [#$sd1_sf7_dp1]

trans-unit.source: To make use of the ORS tools, you first need to sign up. Therefore click `Sign Up`
trans-unit.target: To make use of the ORS tools, you first need to sign up. Therefore click `Sign Up`

trans-unit.source: Sign up and setup
trans-unit.target: Sign up and setup

trans-unit.source: You will be redirected to the Openrouteservice site, where you need to create a user account
trans-unit.target: You will be redirected to the Openrouteservice site, where you need to create a user account

trans-unit.source: After submitting your profile, a confirmation e-mail will be sent to your mail address
trans-unit.target: After submitting your profile, a confirmation e-mail will be sent to your mail address

trans-unit.source: Please confirm your account
trans-unit.target: Please confirm your account

trans-unit.source: You are now able to create tokens (API keys) which allow you to run queries through the ORS Tools plugin in QGIS
trans-unit.target: You are now able to create tokens (API keys) which allow you to run queries through the ORS Tools plugin in QGIS

trans-unit.source: Click into the field under "Request a token" and choose "Free"
trans-unit.target: Click into the field under "Request a token" and choose "Free"

trans-unit.source: Choose a "Token Name" in the field to the right and "Create token"
trans-unit.target: Choose a "Token Name" in the field to the right and "Create token"

trans-unit.source: The token will directly appear above in the "key" field
trans-unit.target: The token will directly appear above in the "key" field

trans-unit.source: Click on the token, it will directly be copied. You can now go back into QGIS for further setup
trans-unit.target: Click on the token, it will directly be copied. You can now go back into QGIS for further setup

trans-unit.source: Configure the plugin
trans-unit.target: Configure the plugin

trans-unit.source: In QGIS and go to `Provider Settings` in the ORS Tools window by clicking the settings icon (right next to „Provider field“)
trans-unit.target: In QGIS and go to `Provider Settings` in the ORS Tools window by clicking the settings icon (right next to „Provider field“)

trans-unit.source: Add the API key you just created into the „API Key“ field
trans-unit.target: Add the API key you just created into the „API Key“ field

trans-unit.source: Add URL: https://api.openrouteservice.org into the Base URL field
trans-unit.target: Add URL: https://api.openrouteservice.org into the Base URL field

trans-unit.source: (Potentially: Click `Add` and enter „openrouteservice“ into the pop up window „Enter a name for the provider“)
trans-unit.target: (Potentially: Click `Add` and enter „openrouteservice“ into the pop up window „Enter a name for the provider“)

trans-unit.source: For further information: [https://github.com/GIScience/orstools-qgis-plugin]
trans-unit.target: For further information: [https://github.com/GIScience/orstools-qgis-plugin]
